stemHtml: Which of the following describes internal respiration?

options.a: The exchange of gases O<sub>2</sub> and CO<sub>2</sub> between the air and capillary arteries of the lung.
options.b: The exchange of gases O<sub>2</sub> and CO<sub>2</sub> between the air and the alveoli.
options.c: The exchange of gases O<sub>2</sub> and CO<sub>2</sub> inside the cells of the body.
options.d: The exchange of gases O<sub>2</sub> and CO<sub>2</sub> in the bronchi.
